markets.title: Fed raises rates in December 2024?
markets.rules_primary: Resolves YES if the FOMC raises the federal funds rate at its December 2024 meeting.

markets.title: Fed raises rates by 75bp or more in December 2024?
markets.rules_primary: Resolves YES if the FOMC raises the federal funds rate by 75 basis points or more at its December 2024 meeting.

markets.title: Snowfall exceeds 10in in NYC in December 2024?
markets.rules_primary: Resolves YES if official NWS snowfall totals for NYC in December 2024 exceed 10 inches.

markets.title: Fake perpetual-style product (must be refused)
markets.rules_primary: Not a bounded-loss binary contract; must never be normalized (SPEC S1.1 invariant 2).

markets.title: Fake scalar-style product (must be refused)
markets.rules_primary: Scalar settlement, not a binary payout; must never be normalized.
